zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Botetourt於大約1305年出生在英國時，她的父親John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt40歲，母親Maud fitz Thomas37歲。她於1337年8月20日之前與Robert de Ufford結婚。她去世於1384年4月11日在她的家鄉享年80歲，埋葬在英國貝德福爾貝德福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Botetourt于大约1305年出生在英国时，她的父亲John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt40岁，母亲Maud fitz Thomas37岁。她于1337年8月20日之前与Robert de Ufford结婚。她去世于1384年4月11日在她的家乡享年80岁，埋葬在英国貝德福爾貝德福德。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Botetourt was born about 1305, in England, her father, John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt, was 40 and her mother, Maud fitz Thomas, was 37. She married Robert de Ufford before 20 August 1337. She died on 11 April 1384, in her hometown, at the age of 80, and was buried in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Botetourt est née environ 1305, à Angleterre, son père, John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Maud fitz Thomas, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Ufford avant 20 août 1337. Elle est décédée le 11 avril 1384, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterrée à Bedford, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Botetourt um 1305 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt 40 und ihre Mutter Maud fitz Thomas 37. Sie hat vor 20. August 1337 Robert de Ufford geheiratet. Sie starb am 11. April 1384 im Alter von 80 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Botetourt è nata il circa 1305 nel England, sua padre, John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Maud fitz Thomas, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Ufford prima del 20 agosto 1337. Morì il 11 aprile 1384, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolta a Bedford, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Botetourtが約1305年にイギリスで生まれた時，父John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourtは40歳，母Maud fitz Thomasは37歳であった。1337年8月20日以前にRobert de Uffordと結婚した。彼女は1384年4月11日に故郷で80歳で死去し，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアベドフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Botetourt(이)가 대략 1305년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud fitz Thomas(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1337년 8월 20일 이전 Robert de Ufford(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1384년 4월 11일 그녀의 고향에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 베드퍼드실르 베드퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Botetourt nasceu aproximadamente 1305, em Inglaterra, seu pai, John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Maud fitz Thomas, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Ufford antes 20 de agosto de 1337. Ela faleceu em 11 de abril de 1384, em sua cidade natal, com 80 anos, e foi sepultada em Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Botetourt родилась около 1305 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud fitz Thomas, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Ufford перед 20 августа 1337 г. Она умерла 11 апреля 1384 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 80 лет и была похоронена в местности бедфорд, бедфордшир, Англия.
